briefdescription.para: Marks a public event declaration block in RADObject-derived classes.
Marks a public handler declaration block in RADObject-derived classes.
Starts an INFO log stream; use like RADInfo() << "message".
Starts a DEBUG log stream; use like RADDebug() << "message".
Declares a typed RADCore event; example: RAD_EVENT(done, (int)).
Connects an event to a receiver handler using the receiver's thread affinity.
Connects an event to a receiver handler by posting through an explicit event loop.
Raises an event with optional arguments.
Stream-style event trigger helper used as rtrig << event(args...).
Core RADLib primitives: events, event loops, timers, IO, JSON, settings, filesystem helpers, processes, threads, and value types.
